name: Help Content Block
summary: Descriptive help or notice block using HelpContent element with markdown support
whenToUse: Displaying important notices like privacy collection statements
Adding instructional paragraphs or warnings between form sections
Providing rich-text guidance that is not tied to a specific field

help: The personal information on this form is collected under the authority of Section 33(c) of the Freedom of Information and Protection of Privacy Act (FOIP) and will be used for the purpose of administering the Alberta Approved Farmers' Market Program. If you have any questions about the collection and use of your information, please contact the Farmers' Market Specialist, Alberta Agriculture, Forestry and Rural Development at [ab.approvedfarmersmarket@gov.ab.ca](ab.approvedfarmersmarket@gov.ab.ca) or telephone: 780-581-4107.

notes: Set `options.markdown` to `true` to enable markdown rendering
Use an array for `options.help` to separate content into multiple lines/paragraphs
HelpContent does not have a scope — it's a display-only element, not bound to data
Useful for FOIP/privacy notices required on Alberta government forms
